external_delivery_id.description: A unique identifier for this delivery, provided by the caller.

pickup_address.description: The full street address for the pickup location.

pickup_business_name.description: The business name at the pickup location.

pickup_phone_number.description: The phone number at the pickup location.

pickup_instructions.description: Special instructions for the Dasher at the pickup location.

pickup_reference_tag.description: A reference tag for the pickup, such as an order number.

dropoff_address.description: The full street address for the dropoff location.

dropoff_business_name.description: The business name at the dropoff location.

dropoff_phone_number.description: The phone number of the recipient at the dropoff location.

dropoff_instructions.description: Special instructions for the Dasher at the dropoff location.

dropoff_contact_given_name.description: The first name of the dropoff contact.

dropoff_contact_family_name.description: The last name of the dropoff contact.

order_value.description: The total value of the order in cents.

pickup_time.description: The requested pickup time in UTC ISO-8601 format.

dropoff_time.description: The requested dropoff time in UTC ISO-8601 format.

contains_alcohol.description: Whether the order contains alcohol, which requires age verification.

force_batch_id.description: An identifier to group deliveries together for batch assignment to the same Dasher.

external_business_id.description: The external business ID to associate with this delivery.

external_store_id.description: The external store ID to associate with this delivery.

items.description: List of items included in the delivery.
